title: Fix audio playback for all sound effects

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Dreamy.mp3' sound effect on the Lock Screen so it plays successfully when the correct passcode is entered
acceptanceCriteria: Dreamy.mp3 plays audibly when the correct password is submitted on the Lock Screen
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Dreamy.mp3
Audio plays in production deployment, not just local dev

file_operations.description: Update the Dreamy.mp3 audio reference to use a root-relative public asset path (e.g., '/assets/audio/Dreamy.mp3'). Ensure the Audio object is created and preloaded correctly. Verify the play() call is wrapped in proper error handling and triggered within the user interaction event handler (form submit) to comply with browser autoplay policies. Add .catch() to handle any playback failures gracefully.

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Hello.mp3' sound effect on the Chat page so it plays when the Chat section is opened or a message is sent
acceptanceCriteria: Hello.mp3 plays audibly when entering or interacting with the Chat page
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Hello.mp3

file_operations.description: Update the Hello.mp3 audio reference to use a root-relative public asset path (e.g., '/assets/audio/Hello.mp3'). Ensure the Audio object is preloaded on component mount. Trigger playback within a user interaction event handler (e.g., when opening chat or sending a message) to avoid autoplay restrictions. Add proper error handling with .catch() on the play() promise to prevent unhandled rejections.

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Double Knock.mp3' global click/touch sound so it plays on every click or touch event across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: Double Knock.mp3 plays audibly on every click or tap anywhere in the app
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Double Knock.mp3
Throttle of ~120ms between plays still applies

file_operations.description: Update the Double Knock.mp3 audio file path to use a root-relative public asset path (e.g., '/assets/audio/Double Knock.mp3') so it resolves correctly in production builds. Ensure the Audio object is properly instantiated and preloaded on hook initialization. Add error handling to the play() promise with .catch() to log failures without breaking the throttle logic. Verify the 120ms throttle timing remains unchanged. Consider adding a loaded state check before attempting playback.

requirements.summary: Audit and relocate all three audio files to frontend/public/assets/audio/ and update all reference paths to use production-safe root-relative URLs
acceptanceCriteria: All three audio files exist under frontend/public/ (e.g. frontend/public/assets/audio/)
All hooks and pages reference audio files using root-relative paths that work in production
Network tab in browser DevTools shows 200 responses for all audio file requests

file_operations.description: Copy or move the Dreamy.mp3 audio file from the assets directory to frontend/public/assets/audio/Dreamy.mp3. Verify the file is a valid MP3 format and not corrupted. This file will be served as a static asset and referenced via '/assets/audio/Dreamy.mp3' in the LockScreen component.

Copy or move the Hello.mp3 audio file from the assets directory to frontend/public/assets/audio/Hello.mp3. Verify the file is a valid MP3 format and not corrupted. This file will be served as a static asset and referenced via '/assets/audio/Hello.mp3' in the ChatPage component.

Copy or move the 'Double Knock.mp3' audio file from the assets directory to frontend/public/assets/audio/Double Knock.mp3. Note the filename includes a space. Verify the file is a valid MP3 format and not corrupted. This file will be served as a static asset and referenced via '/assets/audio/Double Knock.mp3' in the useDoubleKnockSound hook. Consider URL-encoding the space in the path reference or renaming the file to 'double-knock.mp3' for better compatibility.
